name: new setup from fresh URL starts with discover
input: Use analytics-tracking-automation to set up GA4 and GTM tracking for https://www.example.com from scratch.

name: analysis only request stays in discover
input: Analyze https://www.example.com and stop after site analysis.

name: resume artifact directory uses status first
site analysis without confirmed groups routes to grouping
input: Continue from ./output/example_com/site-analysis.json and help me review the page groups.

name: confirmed site analysis with live GTM pending routes to live baseline review
input: Continue from ./output/example_com/site-analysis.json before schema work starts.

name: event schema artifact routes to schema phase
gtm config artifact routes to sync
gtm context artifact routes to verify
input: Run preview QA for ./output/example_com/gtm-context.json before publish.

name: tracking update keeps mode-first intake
input: We already have tracking live. Run a tracking update for new CTA flows and revised signup paths.

name: upkeep keeps mode-first intake
input: Do an upkeep review for this setup and tell me what drifted.

name: health audit starts with discover but stays audit oriented
input: Run a tracking health audit for https://www.example.com. I only want assessment, not deployment work.

name: confirmed Shopify branch can hand off to shopify overlay
input: Continue this Shopify tracking setup with the Shopify-specific path now.
expectedStopBoundary: requested Shopify-specific artifact or manual verification plan
